admin.title: Tableau de bord admin

arzt.login.title: Accès médecin

arzt.sendHint: Envoyez un message pour contacter directement le patient.

autologout.message: Vous avez été inactif pendant un moment. Pour des raisons de sécurité, vous serez automatiquement déconnecté.
autologout.title: Déconnexion automatique
botGreeting: Bonjour ! Je suis votre assistant numérique. Comment puis-je vous aider ?
botHelpPrompt: Besoin d'aide ? Tapez « aide » ou sélectionnez un sujet :
camera.positionCard: Veuillez positionner la carte dans le cadre
cameraExplanation: Scan your electronic health insurance card (eGK) to automatically read your name, date of birth, and insurance details. Simply hold the card in front of the camera.
certify.confirm_text: Veuillez vérifier l'identité du patient à l'aide d'une pièce d'identité valide.
certify.name: Nom
certify.pattern_desc: Le patient va maintenant dessiner un motif de sécurité pour les visites futures.
certify.pattern_error: Le motif n'a pas pu être enregistré
certify.title: Certification du Patient
chat.faq_accessibility: Notre application prend en charge 10 langues, des tailles de police ajustables, le mode sombre et la compatibilité avec les lecteurs d'écran.
chat.faq_appointment: Vous pouvez préparer vos rendez-vous via « Rendez-vous / Anamnèse ». L'anamnèse prend environ 5 à 8 minutes.
chat.faq_camera: With the camera function you can scan your electronic health card (eGK). Name, date of birth, and insurance number are read automatically.
chat.faq_costs: Private services (IGeL) are billed according to GOÄ (fee schedule for physicians). Statutory health insurance services are billed directly via your insurance card. You will be informed of any costs before treatment.
chat.faq_data_deletion: Your data will be automatically deleted 24 hours after session completion. You can also request immediate deletion at any time per GDPR Art. 17 (right to erasure).
chat.faq_documents: Under "Documents / Findings" you can upload external findings, lab results, or other documents. PDF, JPG, and PNG up to 10 MB are allowed.
chat.faq_emergency: ⚠️ En cas d'urgence médicale, appelez immédiatement le 112 !
chat.faq_fallback: Je n'ai pas pu identifier votre demande. Essayez une autre question ou passez au chat de l'équipe.
chat.faq_help: Sélectionnez votre motif sur la page d'accueil. L'assistant vous guidera étape par étape.
chat.faq_insurance: We accept statutory (GKV) and private (PKV) insured patients as well as self-payers. Please have your insurance card ready.
chat.faq_medication: You can request follow-up prescriptions via "Medications / Prescriptions". Please provide the active ingredient, dosage, and package size. E-prescriptions are available when the insurance card has been read this quarter.
chat.faq_parking: Information about parking and accessibility can be found on our website or ask at reception. We are easily accessible by public transport.
chat.faq_prescriptions: Repeat prescriptions can be requested via 'Medications / Prescriptions'. Processing usually takes 24 hours. E-prescriptions are possible when the insurance card has been read this quarter.
chat.faq_privacy: Vos données sont chiffrées avec AES-256 lors de la transmission et du stockage. Le traitement est conforme au RGPD.
chat.faq_referral: You can request referrals via "Referral". Please specify the desired specialty and reason.
chat.faq_results: Lab results and reports are usually available within 2-3 business days. You can view them digitally in the app or request them at the reception.
chat.faq_sick_leave: You can request a sick leave certificate via "Sick Leave (AU)". Describe your symptoms and how long you have had them.
chat.faq_vaccination: Please bring your vaccination record to your appointment. We offer all standard vaccinations recommended by STIKO. Flu vaccinations are available seasonally.
chat.faq_waiting: You can check your current position in the waiting room at any time in the app. Average waiting time depends on the urgency of patients – emergency cases are always prioritized.
chatExplanation: You can communicate directly with our practice team here. If you have questions or need help, simply send us a message.
checkoutRedirect: You will now be redirected to the secure payment provider.
dataProtectionDetail: AES-256 encrypted • GDPR-compliant • Exclusively for medical use
docs.arch.title: Technologie et architecture
docs.faq.dsgvo.a: Oui. Toutes les données patients sont chiffrées avec AES-256-GCM. Le système comprend un dialogue de consentement en trois étapes selon le RGPD Art. 6 et Art. 9.
docs.faq.emergency.a: Le système contient 10 règles de triage clinique – dont 4 CRITIQUES. L'évaluation médicale reste toujours au médecin.
docs.faq.pvs.a: Non. DiggAI complète votre logiciel. Les données peuvent être exportées en PDF, CSV ou JSON.
docs.faq.pvs.q: DiggAI remplace-t-il mon logiciel de gestion de cabinet ?
docs.faq.smartphone.a: Trois options : (1) Fournir une tablette avec code QR, (2) Un accompagnant remplit sur son propre appareil, (3) Mode assisté par MFA.
docs.faq.smartphone.q: Que se passe-t-il si un patient n'a pas de smartphone ?
docs.faq.start.a: Immédiatement. DiggAI fonctionne comme application web dans le navigateur – aucune installation nécessaire.
docs.faq.start.q: En combien de temps pouvons-nous commencer ?
docs.faq.title: Questions fréquentes
docs.feature.anamnese.desc: 270+ questions médicales dans 10 flux structurés. Le routage intelligent ne montre que les questions pertinentes.
docs.feature.anamnese.h1: 10 Services : Rendez-vous, ordonnances, arrêt maladie, accident BG, orientation, etc.
docs.feature.anamnese.h2: 13 Spécialités : de la cardiologie à la gynécologie
docs.feature.anamnese.h3: Routage intelligent par âge, sexe, symptômes
docs.feature.anamnese.title: Anamnèse numérique
docs.feature.chat.desc: Chat bidirectionnel entre patient et équipe médicale. Bot FAQ intégré.
docs.feature.chat.h3: Synchronisation en temps réel via WebSocket
docs.feature.chat.title: Chat en temps réel
docs.feature.dashboards.desc: Role-based dashboards with live statistics, AI summaries, PDF/CSV export and real-time waiting room management.
docs.feature.dashboards.title: Tableaux de bord médecin et MFA
docs.feature.multilang.desc: Prise en charge complète de 10 langues dont l'allemand, l'anglais, le turc, l'arabe (RTL), l'ukrainien, l'espagnol, le farsi, l'italien, le français et le polonais.
docs.feature.multilang.h1: Mise en page RTL pour l'arabe et le farsi
docs.feature.multilang.title: 10 Langues
docs.feature.security.desc: AES-256-GCM encryption for all patient data. Three-stage GDPR consent, audit trail and automatic deletion after 24 hours.
docs.feature.security.title: RGPD et chiffrement
docs.feature.triage.desc: 10 clinical triage rules check every answer in real time. For critical symptom constellations, the practice team is alerted in under 2 seconds.
docs.feature.triage.h1: 4 CRITICAL alerts: ACS, suicidality, SAH, syncope
docs.feature.triage.h3: Immediate notification in the doctor dashboard
docs.feature.triage.title: Triage IA en temps réel
docs.features.title: Aperçu des fonctionnalités
docs.footer: Accueil numérique des patients. Made in Germany.
docs.subtitle: Accueil numérique des patients pour cabinets médicaux – multilingue, IA, conforme RGPD.
docs.title: DiggAI Anamnèse
dsgvoConsent1Desc: I consent that the practice may process my personal data provided in the questionnaire (name, date of birth, contact details, insurance status) for the purpose of treatment planning and appointment preparation.
dsgvoConsent2Desc: I expressly consent pursuant to Art. 9(2)(a) GDPR to the processing of my health data (pre-existing conditions, medications, symptoms, allergies). This data is used exclusively for medical care.
dsgvoConsent2Title: Traitement de catégories particulières (données de santé)
dsgvoConsent3Desc: I am aware that I can revoke this consent at any time without giving reasons. A revocation does not affect the lawfulness of the processing carried out up to that point. I can contact the practice at any time to have my data deleted.
dsgvoConsent3Title: Droit de révocation et suppression des données
dsgvoIntroBody: In order to provide you with the best possible care, we collect and process personal and medical data within this digital medical history form. Please read the following information carefully.
dsgvoPolicy1Text: Cabinet médical (l'adresse est affichée au cabinet)
dsgvoPolicy2Text: Les données sont collectées pour la préparation et la réalisation de votre traitement médical (Art. 6(1)(b) RGPD en lien avec Art. 9(2)(h) RGPD).
dsgvoPolicy3Text: Vos données sont conservées conformément aux délais de conservation médicaux (§ 630f BGB : 10 ans après la fin du traitement).
dsgvoPolicy4b: Chiffrement AES-256-GCM pour les données personnelles
dsgvoPolicy4e: Journalisation d'audit conforme HIPAA de tous les accès aux données
dsgvoPolicy5Text: Accès (Art. 15), Rectification (Art. 16), Effacement (Art. 17), Limitation (Art. 18), Portabilité des données (Art. 20), Opposition (Art. 21), Réclamation auprès de l'autorité de contrôle.
dsgvoPolicy6Text: Les coordonnées du délégué à la protection des données sont disponibles au cabinet.
dsgvoPolicy6Title: 6. Contact du délégué à la protection des données
dsgvoSecurityNote: Vos données sont chiffrées avec AES-256-GCM et utilisées exclusivement pour le traitement médical. Elles ne quittent jamais l'environnement sécurisé.
errorBoundary.description: L'application a rencontré un problème inattendu. Veuillez recharger la page.
errorBoundary.title: Une erreur est survenue

fontsize.reset: Réinitialiser la taille de la police
game.data_submitted: Vos données ont été transmises en toute sécurité au cabinet.
game.finish_desc: Vous avez terminé avec succès le parcours d'anamnèse.
game.finish_desc_child: Tu as visité toutes les stations !
game.instruction_child: Réponds aux questions du mieux que tu peux ! 🌟
game.subtitle: Visitez toutes les stations et remplissez le questionnaire de manière ludique.
game.subtitle_child: Visite toutes les stations et collectionne les étoiles !
game.title: 🗺️ Aventure Anamnèse
handbuch.sec.a11y.s1.desc: Click the language icon at the top right to switch between German, English, Turkish, Arabic, Ukrainian and Spanish. The interface switches immediately.
handbuch.sec.a11y.s1.title: Switch language
handbuch.sec.a11y.s2.desc: Via the sun/moon icon, switch between light and dark mode. The setting is saved.
handbuch.sec.a11y.s2.title: Dark/Light Mode
handbuch.sec.a11y.s3.desc: Use the font size controls to adjust text size between 90% and 150%. Ideal for elderly patients or those with visual impairments.
handbuch.sec.a11y.s3.title: Adjust font size
handbuch.sec.a11y.s4.desc: Activate kiosk mode for waiting room tablets. The mode optimizes the display for touch operation and prevents accidental exit from the app.
handbuch.sec.a11y.s4.title: Kiosk mode
handbuch.sec.a11y.title: Accessibilité et paramètres
handbuch.sec.admin.s1.desc: The admin dashboard at /admin offers 7 tabs: Overview, Patient Flow, Security, Export, Productivity, Architecture and Changelog. Live metrics show current practice operations.
handbuch.sec.admin.s1.title: Overview & Statistics
handbuch.sec.admin.s2.desc: Monitor audit trail, encryption status and access rights. All actions are logged with timestamp, user ID and IP address.
handbuch.sec.admin.s2.title: Security Monitoring
handbuch.sec.admin.s3.desc: Export aggregated reports on practice utilization, language distribution and triage statistics. Available as PDF, CSV or JSON.
handbuch.sec.admin.s3.title: Data Export & Reports
handbuch.sec.admin.title: Zone d'administration
handbuch.sec.arzt.s1.desc: Navigate to /arzt and log in. You'll immediately see all patient sessions assigned to you with live status.
handbuch.sec.arzt.s1.title: Login at /arzt
handbuch.sec.arzt.s2.desc: Click on a session to open the AI-powered summary. Answers are clinically sorted: Personal data → Concern → Medical history → Pre-existing conditions.
handbuch.sec.arzt.s2.tip: Tip: Triage flags are color-highlighted. Red flags require immediate attention.
handbuch.sec.arzt.s2.title: Read AI summary
handbuch.sec.arzt.s3.desc: For critical symptom constellations, a real-time alert appears. Acknowledge the alert with one click to document that you have taken note of it.
handbuch.sec.arzt.s3.title: Acknowledge triage alerts
handbuch.sec.arzt.s4.desc: Via the integrated real-time chat, you can ask follow-up questions to the patient before they enter the consultation room.
handbuch.sec.arzt.s4.title: Chat with the patient
handbuch.sec.arzt.s5.desc: Export anamnesis data as PDF with practice header, as CSV (compatible with Excel and PMS) or as JSON for technical integrations.
handbuch.sec.arzt.s5.title: Export: PDF, CSV, JSON
handbuch.sec.arzt.title: Tableau de bord médecin
handbuch.sec.mfa.s1.desc: Open the app and navigate to /mfa. Log in with your credentials. The dashboard shows all incoming patient sessions.
handbuch.sec.mfa.s1.title: Login at /mfa
handbuch.sec.mfa.s2.desc: Create QR codes for the waiting room. Patients scan the code and start the anamnesis on their own smartphone.
handbuch.sec.mfa.s2.tip: Tip: Print QR codes and place them in the waiting room, at the reception and in the treatment rooms.
handbuch.sec.mfa.s2.title: Generate QR codes
handbuch.sec.mfa.s3.desc: Assign incoming sessions to the responsible doctor. The system automatically suggests the appropriate doctor based on the specialty.
handbuch.sec.mfa.s3.title: Assign patients to doctor
handbuch.sec.mfa.s4.desc: The real-time waiting room shows all patients with status (waiting, called, in treatment). Call patients and start treatment with one click.
handbuch.sec.mfa.s4.title: Manage waiting room
handbuch.sec.mfa.title: Tableau de bord MFA
handbuch.sec.questionnaire.s1.desc: Enter your name, date of birth, gender and insurance data. Existing patients can skip these fields.
handbuch.sec.questionnaire.s1.title: Enter personal data
handbuch.sec.questionnaire.s2.desc: Answer the questions step by step. You can switch language at any time, adjust the font size or activate dark mode.
handbuch.sec.questionnaire.s2.tip: Tip: For medical terms, you'll find explanations via the info icon (ℹ️).
handbuch.sec.questionnaire.s2.title: Answer medical questions
handbuch.sec.questionnaire.s3.desc: Select the affected body region from 13 options. The system automatically activates the appropriate specialty-specific questions (e.g., cardiology, neurology).
handbuch.sec.questionnaire.s3.title: Select body region
handbuch.sec.questionnaire.s4.desc: At the end, you see a structured summary of all information. Review everything and send the data encrypted to the practice team.
handbuch.sec.questionnaire.s4.title: Review summary & submit
handbuch.sec.questionnaire.title: Remplir le questionnaire
handbuch.sec.security.s1.desc: All patient data is encrypted with AES-256-GCM – the same standard used by banks. Encryption happens already on your device (client-side encryption).
handbuch.sec.security.s1.title: Encryption
handbuch.sec.security.s2.desc: Incomplete sessions are automatically deleted after 24 hours. Completed sessions can be exported by the doctor and then manually deleted.
handbuch.sec.security.s2.title: Automatic Deletion
handbuch.sec.security.s3.desc: You have the right to access, rectification and deletion of your data at any time per GDPR. Consent can be withdrawn at any time.
handbuch.sec.security.s3.title: Your Rights
handbuch.sec.security.title: Protection des données et sécurité
handbuch.sec.services.s1.desc: The most comprehensive service: 270+ medical questions with intelligent routing. Based on your answers, only relevant follow-up questions are asked. Coverage: 13 medical specialties.
handbuch.sec.services.s1.title: Appointment / Anamnesis
handbuch.sec.services.s2.desc: Request repeat prescriptions for your regular medication. Enter your current medications – by typing or camera scan of your medication plan.
handbuch.sec.services.s2.title: Medications / Prescriptions
handbuch.sec.services.s3.desc: Request a sick leave certificate. Describe your symptoms and when they started.
handbuch.sec.services.s3.title: Sick Leave Certificate
handbuch.sec.services.s4.desc: Document work, commuting or school accidents in a structured format. All relevant fields for BG reporting are covered.
handbuch.sec.services.s4.title: BG Accident Report
handbuch.sec.services.s5.desc: Referral, appointment cancellation, document/results upload, phone request, document request and general messages to the practice team.
handbuch.sec.services.s5.title: More Services
handbuch.sec.services.title: Les 10 services
handbuch.sec.start.s1.desc: Scan the QR code in the waiting room with your smartphone camera or open the link given to you by the MFA. The app runs directly in the browser – no installation needed.
handbuch.sec.start.s1.tip: Tip: You can also save the app as a PWA on your home screen for faster access.
handbuch.sec.start.s1.title: Scan QR code or open link
handbuch.sec.start.s2.desc: On first access, a privacy dialog appears. Read the information and confirm consent per GDPR Art. 6 and Art. 9. Without consent, no data can be collected.
handbuch.sec.start.s2.title: Confirm GDPR consent
handbuch.sec.start.s3.desc: On the homepage you see 10 service tiles. Select the appropriate concern: Anamnesis, prescription request, sick leave, BG accident report, referral and more.
handbuch.sec.start.s3.tip: Tip: The estimated duration is shown on each tile. A complete anamnesis takes only 5–8 minutes.
handbuch.sec.start.s3.title: Select service
handbuch.sec.start.title: Guide pour les patients
handbuch.subtitle: Guide étape par étape pour tous les rôles : patient, MFA, médecin et administrateur.
handbuch.title: Manuel

mfa.receptionNoSelection: Sélectionnez une demande à gauche pour voir les détails, l'e-mail du cabinet et les modèles de réponse.
mfa.receptionPatientEmailMissing: Aucun e-mail patient n'est enregistré pour cette demande. Merci de répondre par téléphone ou sur place.
mfa.receptionResponseDesc: Réponses préstructurées depuis l'e-mail du cabinet avec validation humaine.
